item.title: vlogbrothers: THE BEST DAY
item.description: Refer: YouTube - THE BEST DAY [vlogbrothers] Sports teams can be treated as community assets. In some domains, modern capitalism has reduced sport teams to franchises - business operated from the PoV of profiteering. This is a very fundamental point connected to TATA IPL and F1 (Visa Cash App RB F1 Team). I am not trying to judge one against the other. Personal opinions aside, both setups bring value to the table.
